notableEvents.label: Corey Seager GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Josh Jung out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.
